backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as a placeholder backend with no logic implemented.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the Tinder-style profile card header feature, listing the affected files, components, and test IDs with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files, describing the purpose and key details of each component, style, and data file.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including colors for backgrounds, borders, charts, and sidebar elements.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the 'Economic Tinder' app that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that renders the PresentationApp as the sole top-level component with no routing.
frontend/src/components/EconomistRevealC: Animated card component that reveals an economist's profile using a Tinder-style ProfileCardHeader, followed by the user's choice badge, key belief bullets, and a discussion prompt.
frontend/src/components/LightningRoundSl: Lightning round slide that cycles through rapid-fire statements one at a time, collects agree/disagree answers, then reveals all economist matches simultaneously.
Main presentation controller managing slide navigation, swipe choice state, and rendering the correct slide component with a header progress bar and footer navigation buttons.
frontend/src/components/ProfileCardHeade: A Tinder-style profile card header component that displays a full-bleed economist portrait with a gradient overlay, name, era, school of thought, and optional badge labels.
frontend/src/components/ProgressIndicato: A progress indicator component that renders dot-based step markers and a numeric counter showing the current slide out of total slides.
frontend/src/components/RulesSlide.tsx: A slide component that displays the game rules with icons and a swipe-left/right preview UI before the quiz begins.
frontend/src/components/StatementSlide.t: A statement slide component that shows a blurred mystery economist portrait before voting, then reveals the economist's profile card and discussion prompt after the user swipes left or right.
frontend/src/components/SummarySlide.tsx: A results summary slide that displays all economists in a grid, highlighting matched (swiped-right) economists with gold badges and a match count, plus a restart button.
frontend/src/components/SwipeButton.tsx: A reusable swipe button component rendering agree/disagree buttons with thumbs-up/down icons, supporting multiple sizes and disabled state.
frontend/src/components/TitleSlide.tsx: The opening title slide component displaying the Economic Tinder logo, title, subtitle, feature bullets, and a start button.
frontend/src/data/slides.ts: Static data array defining all slides for the Economic Tinder quiz, including title, rules, economist statement slides with portraits and discussion prompts, and a summary slide.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder file with no backend queries, exported as an empty module for a frontend-only app.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the app's dark-themed design system including gold, swipe, and slide surface tokens.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/types/slides.ts: TypeScript type definitions for all slide variants (title, rules, statement, lightning, summary) used in the Economic Tinder presentation, plus swipe choice types.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with OKLCH color tokens, custom font families (Playfair Display, Inter), border radii, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking version, existing features, and image requirements for the Economic Tinder app, including Tinder-style economist profile card UI as an implemented feature.
